events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: sawcutting was delayed past the ACI 302/308 window, so shrinkage stresses relieved themselves through random cracking instead of at the planned control joints — an installed-defective condition at rough-complete stage. Marked `fail`/medium risk, with actions to cut remaining joints immediately, map/seal existing cracks, and correct curing/sawcut timing on future pours.
